title: lathyrus albus var. versicolor
intro: Lathyrus albus var. versicolor, also known as white lathyrus or white pea, is a variety of the Lathyrus albus plant, a flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) with white or white-pink flowers. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lathyrus albus var. versicolor include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Lathyrus albus var. versicolor can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
